children.heading: .—General
children.label: a .—General
children.text: The Secretary of Transportation shall make available from amounts made available to carry out $4,000,000 for each of the fiscal years ending , and , $2,550,000 for each of fiscal years 1995, 1996, and 1997, and $1,855,000 for the period of , through , to carry out this chapter.section 402 of title 23September 30, 1993September 30, 1994October 1, 1997March 31, 1998

children.heading: .—Availability of Amounts
children.label: b .—Availability of Amounts
children.text: Amounts authorized under this section remain available until expended.
